sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45495" key="eu)xi/maros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐχίμᾰρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n45495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rich in goats,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.108</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Myrin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
